title: Farberware Professional Plastic Measuring Cups with Coffee Spoon, Set of 5
description:
About this item
MEASURING SET: includes 1/4 cup, 1/3 cup, 1/2 cup, and 1 cup sizes, plus coffee scoop
EASY TO USE: clearly marked measurements and assorted colors help you quickly find sizes
BONUS COFFEE SCOOP: measures out the perfect amount for a pot of coffee every time
SIMPLE STORAGE: cups nest together for easy access in drawers and cabinets
DISHWASHER SAFE: for easy cleanup
reviews_5s: What can I say they're measuring cups, sturdy and do what they're meant to do. Can't go wrong stackable and easy to clean. Love them.Who knew that Farberware made plastic measuring cups?! It was the name that attracted me, and I needed a set, so why not entertain the cook (me) with vibrant colors? They're accurate, strong, dishwasher safe, and they make me smile. :-)We wanted an extra set of small measuring utensils for making meals for our dogs and wanted them to clearly stand out against the rest of our cookware. These are perfect for that! They are nice and sturdy, feel good in the hand, are a fun assortment of colors, and work well (as we expected). These are such a great little value and an inexpensive way to add a bit of fun to your kitchen without feeling the sort of buyer’s remorse that can often accompany cheap products.They seem to be very sturdy, love the colours they come in, also then handle has enough space for you to hold the cups properly and they come with a clip at the top that hold them all in one place . No misplacing the cupsLove these measuring cups. I love that they stack and stay together so they don't get lost in the cupboard. The colors are great, nice and bright. Easy to read the measuring size. Dishwasher safe.I ordered these measuring cups because I started meal prepping and for the price. Surprisingly these are really sturdy cups and I like the fact they are colored!Colors as shown. Quality. Long lasting. Sturdy. Strong.They work as intended. I needed some sturdy, inexpensive cups to use at work, and these are perfect. They seem durable enough, as I don't plan on playing tennis with them.Great quality!Ok
reviews_1s:
Supposedly dishwasher safe. Maybe for cleaning but not for labeling. Washed off using top rack on dishwasher on first wash. Totally useless. Returning these for some stainless-steel ones. Don't know why so many good reviews. Farberware has really gone downhill.I’ve gotten nicer measurement cups from the Dollar Tree. Maybe I got a defective one but the edges on the handle were sharp with jagged plastic.

I kept them because I needed extra measuring cups quick for my pets’ food boxes while they were being looked after by a friend. Otherwise, I would have returned.The 1 cup spoon's handle broke 3 years later. It has always been hand washed. So it didn't last long.Product had food, deep scratches inside and on the rims of the cups it was a gift and looked used so I won’t be purchasing again! I expected it to be clean and new especially since it came packaged. I was not able to get a refund.The cups were damaged during shipment. A big chunk was missing from one of them too. This was a disappointing purchase. I love the colors though but can't use them.These measuring cups are used maybe a few times a month and the entire handle snapped off the 1 cup measure in less than 8 months. I still have measuring cups my mom used 60 years ago. Don't buy these.One of the measurement cup is broke already, ( actually broke about 3 weeks ago, I just didn’t have time to write the review ). So I just change the title from easy to read to easy to broke!!! ( see pic ) ( I was going to give it a 5 star ….. I will probably buy it again, just not from this brand or type or this seller.I bought a second set because my previous set had one break…the 1/2 cup. Now the one cup has broken on the new set. Going to buy some metal ones and see if they last. All I did was scoop sugar with this last one. I bake a lot so I’m sure the previous break was something similar.Handle broke scooping a 1/2 cup of sugar. This is an apparent design flaw as others have the same experience.I really loved these cups at first. But the plastic is peeling and the paint is fading/melting after just 90 days. We don't have a dishwasher and have been washing these by hand. Unfortunately, we're outside of the return window, so we'll just have to toss these and get something more durable for cooking and baking.
